step_rationale: Focal adhesion protein anchoring actin cytoskeleton; component of thrombus platelet adhesion machinery.
mechanism: PARVA is a focal adhesion protein that anchors the actin cytoskeleton in platelets, supporting firm adhesion and thrombotic response at the injury site.

references.title: Proteomic characterization of human coronary thrombus in patients with ST-segment elevation acute myocardial infarction.
